case_title: MONTE STOTT & ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. LEONARD SCHWARTZBURD

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MONTE STOTT & ASSOCIATES, INC. SCHWARTZBURD, LEONARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE ORDER OF THE COURT ISSUED AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 7/26/16. MATTER WAS SET FOR A PROGRESS REPORT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED JUN-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHWARTZBURD, LEONARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $885.00 FILED BY MONTE STOTT & ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHWARTZBURD, LEONARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTE STOTT & ASSOCIATES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-13-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE MONTE STOTT, PRINCIPAL/OWNER OF MONTE STOTT & ASSOCIATES, INC., AND DEFENDANT LEONARD SCHWARTZBURD. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
